creator: kkennawa@physics.adelaide.edu.au
text:
On Sun, 31 Jan 1999 jim@phrantic.phear.net wrote:

> >Synopsis:       new port: wmdate-0.3

0.5 is out - I whipped up a quick port myself earlier this afternoon, but
looks like it's vanished from my HD. It compiled just as easily as 0.3 seems
to, so it should be just a matter of changing the md5 and distname.

Kris
